_note: Curated 'dream workshop leads' board for ZABAL Gamez, rendered at /dream-leads. Team-maintained: community nominations arrive via the Formspree form on the page (form_source=zabal-games-dream-lead-nomination) and get reviewed before being added here. Each lead needs a stable unique `id` (lowercase a-z0-9-_) - it is the upvote key in /api/dream-vote, so do not change an id once it has votes. Handles are bare (no @, no URL): farcaster, github, x. Empty handle fields are omitted in the UI. Voting is verified via the Farcaster Mini App (one +1 per FID per lead). Handles left blank where unconfirmed - fill them in before tagging to avoid mis-tagging.

_schema.name: string
_schema.why: one line: what we'd love them to teach

leads.name: Chris Dolinsky (Vini App)
leads.why: Prompt a working app into existence in minutes - the perfect first session for the vibe-coding cohort.

leads.name: Node (DEKEY)
leads.why: Zero-knowledge proofs and peer-to-peer marketplaces, explained by someone shipping one.

leads.name: Nikki Sapp (Juke)
leads.why: Fork an open-source Farcaster client and build your own - audio, voice notes, and the Spaces SDK.

leads.name: Cashless Man (Booster)
leads.why: Self-host your whole stack on a VPS - back end, front end, bots - and own your infrastructure.

leads.name: AZ Flynn (Defense of the Agents)
leads.why: Build a mini-app game people open every day, and the NFT-utility collabs that grow it.

leads.name: Arthur (Neynar)
leads.why: Base / EVM patterns and smart contracts from inside the Farcaster infra team.

leads.name: Kenny (POIDH)
leads.why: Building in public for three years and crowdfunding real-world outcomes on-chain.

leads.name: Max (POWER)
leads.why: Design that converts - a link-in-bio page, embeddable widgets, and agent-friendly pages.

leads.name: Toady Hawk (betrmint)
leads.why: Distribution and tokenized rewards that actually pay creators and founders for showing up.

leads.name: Darko (Runner)
leads.why: Turn a meme into a real consumer app - Strava integration, seasons, and referral loops.

leads.name: DCoopOfficial (Coop Records)
leads.why: Releasing music on-chain and the label angle - how an artist actually keeps the upside.

leads.name: Riley Beans
leads.why: A creator-track session on making and sharing visual work in the ecosystem (specialty to confirm).

leads.name: Ven (The Open Machine)
leads.why: The Open Machine - open, composable building patterns the ecosystem keeps asking about.

leads.name: realproject7
leads.why: An open-source builder the community wants to see lead a session.
